orchestratorOverride: VAL-CONFIG-002 deferred with fix feature export-fcm-fix. VAL-CROSS-003 and VAL-CROSS-006 deferred to web-ui milestone (require web dashboard). All fulfills claims moved accordingly.

failedAssertions.reason: --fps changed timecodes, but FCM line did not reflect frame-rate setting (same value in both exports).

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked by missing web dashboard surface required by this assertion: `web-backend` and `web-frontend` remain `pending` in milestone `web-ui`, `snipsnap.web.app` is not importable, and localhost:3200 is not serving the dashboard/health endpoint.

Blocked on the same unmet web dependency: the assertion requires opening the web transcription browser after CLI transcription, but the dashboard cannot be launched/reached in this milestone context (missing `snipsnap.web.app`, no service on port 3200).
